  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:        (Branch: RELENG_6)
    usr.bin/tar          write.c 
  Log:
  MFC write.c 1.54.  This implements -r support for empty or
  nonexistent files and corrects the bad handling of files that
  change size during archiving.

  PR: bin/108990
